text.div: Diabetes Management Plan - Active plan for patient Ptp08. Goals: HbA1c below 7%, fasting glucose 80-130 mg/dL. Activities: daily glucose monitoring, dietary counseling, metformin therapy, quarterly lab reviews.

title: Diabetes Management Care Plan
description: Comprehensive diabetes management plan including glycemic control, lifestyle modification, medication management, and complication prevention for patient James Johnson.

goal.display: Reduce HbA1c below 7%
Achieve fasting glucose 80-130 mg/dL

progress.text: Patient instructed on glucometer use. Will monitor fasting and post-meal glucose daily.

detail.description: Monitor blood glucose fasting and 2 hours post-meal daily
Metformin 500mg twice daily with meals
Quarterly HbA1c lab review and medication adjustment visit

note.text: Patient motivated and engaged. Referred to diabetes education program. Follow up in 3 months.

text.div: Hypertension Control Plan - Active plan for patient Ptp02. Goal: BP below 130/80 mmHg. Activities: DASH diet, sodium restriction, antihypertensive medication, weekly BP monitoring, 30 min exercise 5x/week.

title: Hypertension Management Care Plan
description: Blood pressure control plan targeting BP below 130/80 mmHg through lifestyle modification and antihypertensive pharmacotherapy for patient Keisha Williams.

goal.display: Achieve BP below 130/80 mmHg
BMI reduction to 25 or below

detail.description: Lisinopril 10mg once daily
Weekly home blood pressure monitoring - log readings
DASH diet education and sodium restriction counseling

note.text: Patient started on Lisinopril 10mg. Return in 4 weeks for BP recheck. Counseled on DASH diet and low sodium intake.

text.div: Post-Surgical Rehabilitation Plan - Active rehabilitation plan for patient ptp03 following total knee arthroplasty. Activities: PT 3x/week, ROM exercises, aquatic therapy, pain management.

title: Total Knee Arthroplasty Rehabilitation Plan
description: Post-operative rehabilitation plan following right total knee arthroplasty for patient Miguel Santos. Goal: restore full ROM and functional ambulation within 12 weeks.

addresses.display: Status post right total knee arthroplasty

goal.display: Achieve 0-120 degrees knee ROM in 6 weeks
Independent ambulation without assistive device in 12 weeks

detail.description: Physical therapy 3 times per week - ROM, strengthening, gait training
Aquatic therapy 2x per week beginning week 3
Acetaminophen 500mg TID for pain management

note.text: Patient tolerating therapy well. Wound healing appropriately. Crutch assisted ambulation with 50% weight bearing. Advance to full weight bearing by week 2.

text.div: Mental Health Treatment Plan - Active plan for patient ptp04. Diagnosis: Major Depressive Disorder. Treatment: weekly CBT sessions, Sertraline 100mg daily, sleep hygiene, crisis safety plan in place.

title: Mental Health Treatment Plan - Major Depressive Disorder
description: Comprehensive mental health treatment plan for patient Maria Garcia with major depressive disorder. Includes psychotherapy, pharmacotherapy, lifestyle interventions, and safety planning.

goal.display: PHQ-9 score below 5 within 12 weeks
Improved sleep quality and duration

detail.description: Weekly cognitive behavioral therapy sessions - 50 min each
Sertraline 100mg once daily in the morning
Sleep hygiene education and implementation

note.text: Safety assessment completed - no active SI/HI. Crisis plan discussed and provided. Emergency contacts documented. Next appointment in 1 week.

text.div: Chronic Pain Management Plan - Active plan for patient ptp05. Diagnosis: Chronic low back pain. Treatment: Multimodal analgesia, PT, pain psychology, acupuncture. Opioid use minimized per CDC guidelines.

title: Chronic Low Back Pain Management Plan
description: Multimodal chronic pain management plan for patient Thomas Begay with chronic low back pain secondary to lumbar degenerative disc disease. Emphasizes non-opioid and non-pharmacological approaches.

goal.display: Reduce pain NRS to 4 or below
Resume light work duties within 3 months

detail.description: Gabapentin 300mg TID - titrate as tolerated
Physical therapy 2x per week - core stabilization, McKenzie method
Weekly acupuncture for chronic pain management

note.text: Opioid risk assessment completed - low risk. Initiated non-opioid pharmacotherapy. PDMP checked - no prior opioid prescriptions. Patient agreeable to multimodal approach.

text.div: Asthma Management Plan - Active plan for patient Ptp08. Diagnosis: Persistent moderate asthma. Treatment: ICS/LABA combination inhaler, rescue inhaler, allergen avoidance, peak flow monitoring, written asthma action plan provided.

title: Asthma Management and Action Plan
description: Comprehensive asthma management plan for patient Li Chen with moderate persistent asthma. Includes step-up pharmacotherapy, trigger avoidance, peak flow monitoring, and written action plan.

goal.display: ACT score 20 or above within 3 months
Zero ER visits for asthma in 12 months

coding.display: Fluticasone propionate 0.25 MG/ACTUAT / Salmeterol 0.05 MG/ACTUAT Inhalation Powder

detail.description: Fluticasone/Salmeterol 250/50 mcg inhaler 1 puff BID - controller
Albuterol 90mcg 2 puffs PRN q4h for symptom relief
Peak flow monitoring twice daily - log results in asthma diary

note.text: Written asthma action plan provided. Patient educated on green/yellow/red zones. Allergen testing scheduled. Return visit in 6 weeks.

text.div: Heart Failure Management Plan - Active plan for patient ptp07. Diagnosis: HFrEF EF 35%. Treatment: GDMT (ACEi, BB, MRA, SGLT2i), daily weights, fluid/sodium restriction, cardiac rehab referral.

title: Heart Failure with Reduced Ejection Fraction Management Plan
description: Guideline-directed medical therapy plan for patient Marcus Washington with HFrEF (EF 35%). Optimizing GDMT, dietary restrictions, fluid monitoring, and cardiac rehabilitation.

addresses.display: Heart failure with reduced ejection fraction

goal.display: EF improvement to 45% or above in 6 months
Maintain daily weight within 2 lbs of dry weight

detail.description: Lisinopril 10mg BID - titrate to target 40mg/day
Carvedilol 6.25mg BID - uptitrate as tolerated
Cardiac rehabilitation program referral - 36 sessions

note.text: GDMT optimized. Patient counseled on fluid restriction 1.5L/day and sodium limit 2g/day. Daily weight log initiated. ICD evaluation scheduled.

text.div: Oncology Treatment Plan - Active plan for patient ptp08. Diagnosis: Stage IIA breast cancer ER+/PR+/HER2-. Treatment: Post-surgical adjuvant chemotherapy followed by endocrine therapy. Radiation therapy planned.

title: Breast Cancer Adjuvant Treatment Plan
description: Adjuvant treatment plan for patient Carmen Rodriguez with stage IIA, ER+/PR+/HER2- breast cancer following lumpectomy. Plan includes chemotherapy, radiation, and 5-year endocrine therapy.

goal.display: Complete adjuvant chemotherapy without dose reduction
5-year recurrence-free survival

detail.description: AC chemotherapy (Adriamycin + Cyclophosphamide) q21 days x 4 cycles
Whole breast radiation therapy 50 Gy in 25 fractions post-chemotherapy
Tamoxifen 20mg daily for 5 years - endocrine therapy

note.text: Genetic counseling referral placed. BRCA testing ordered. Fertility preservation options discussed (not desired). Port placement scheduled for chemotherapy.

text.div: Prenatal Care Plan - Active plan for patient ptp09. G1P0 at 10 weeks gestation. Low-risk pregnancy. Scheduled prenatal visits, labs, anatomy scan, GBS testing, and birth plan discussion.

title: Prenatal Care Plan - Low Risk Pregnancy
description: Standard prenatal care plan for patient. G1P0, 10 weeks estimated gestational age. EDD 2026-08-15. Low-risk pregnancy. Comprehensive schedule of prenatal visits, screening tests, and patient education.

goal.display: Uncomplicated vaginal delivery at 39+ weeks
Maintain appropriate gestational weight gain 25-35 lbs

detail.description: Initial prenatal visit - completed
Anatomy scan ultrasound at 18-20 weeks
Prenatal vitamin with 0.4mg folic acid daily

note.text: All first trimester labs ordered. Genetic counseling offered - patient declined. Flu and Tdap vaccines recommended and scheduled. Next visit at 14 weeks.

text.div: Substance Use Disorder Treatment Plan - Active plan for patient ptp10. Diagnosis: Opioid use disorder, moderate. Treatment: Buprenorphine/naloxone (Suboxone), weekly counseling, toxicology monitoring, peer recovery support.

title: Opioid Use Disorder Treatment Plan - MOUD
description: Medication for opioid use disorder (MOUD) treatment plan for patient Sophia Nakamura. Buprenorphine/naloxone combined with psychosocial treatment and recovery support services.

goal.display: Complete 90 days of buprenorphine therapy without relapse
Negative toxicology screens for illicit opioids in 6 months

coding.display: Buprenorphine 8 MG / Naloxone 2 MG Sublingual Film

detail.description: Buprenorphine/naloxone 8/2mg sublingual daily - MOUD
Weekly individual counseling sessions - motivational enhancement therapy
Monthly random urine toxicology screening

note.text: PDMP checked. Naloxone kit prescribed and dispensed. Patient enrolled in peer recovery support program. Release of information signed for counselor. Return in 2 weeks.

text.div: Obesity Management Plan - Active plan for patient Ptp08. BMI 38.5 kg/m2. Treatment: 1200 kcal caloric restriction, weekly dietitian visits, behavioral therapy, Phentermine/topiramate ER, bariatric surgery evaluation pending.

title: Obesity Management and Weight Loss Plan
description: Comprehensive obesity management plan for BMI 38.5 targeting 10% weight reduction in 6 months through caloric restriction, behavioral modification, and pharmacotherapy.

goal.display: Achieve 10% body weight reduction (26.5 lbs) in 6 months
BMI below 35 in 6 months

detail.description: Weekly registered dietitian visits - 1200 kcal/day structured meal plan
Phentermine 7.5mg/Topiramate 46mg ER capsule once daily in the morning
30 minutes moderate aerobic exercise 5 days per week

note.text: Bariatric surgery consult placed - patient must demonstrate 6 months of supervised weight loss attempts. Negative pregnancy test confirmed prior to Phentermine/Topiramate initiation.

text.div: COPD Management Plan - Active plan for patient Ptp02. COPD GOLD Stage III (Severe). FEV1 42% predicted. Treatment: Triple inhaler therapy (LAMA/LABA/ICS), pulmonary rehab, supplemental O2 assessment, smoking cessation.

title: COPD Management Plan - GOLD Stage III
description: Comprehensive COPD management plan for patient with GOLD stage III disease. Triple inhaler therapy, pulmonary rehabilitation, supplemental oxygen evaluation, and smoking cessation support.

goal.display: Smoking cessation within 8 weeks
Reduce exacerbation frequency to 0-1 per year

detail.description: Breztri Aerosphere (Budesonide/Glycopyrrolate/Formoterol) 2 inhalations BID
Pulmonary rehabilitation 3x per week - 8-week program
Varenicline (Chantix) for smoking cessation - 12-week course

note.text: Ambulatory O2 saturation 88% on room air with exertion. Referred for nocturnal and ambulatory O2 evaluation. Annual influenza and pneumococcal vaccines administered today.

text.div: Stroke Rehabilitation Plan - Active plan for patient ptp03. 2-week post ischemic stroke with left hemiparesis. Inpatient rehab transitioning to outpatient. Goals: functional independence, speech recovery, fall prevention.

title: Ischemic Stroke Rehabilitation Plan
description: Post-ischemic stroke rehabilitation plan for patient Miguel Santos with left hemiparesis. Comprehensive rehabilitation including PT, OT, speech therapy, secondary stroke prevention, and caregiver education.

addresses.display: Acute ischemic stroke left MCA territory

goal.display: Functional ambulation with minimal assistance in 3 months
Return to baseline speech and communication in 6 months

detail.description: Outpatient PT 5x per week - gait retraining, balance, strengthening
OT 3x per week - ADL retraining, fine motor, cognitive compensation
Aspirin 25mg/Dipyridamole 200mg ER BID - secondary stroke prevention

note.text: Home safety evaluation completed. Grab bars and ramp installed. Patient and caregiver educated on stroke warning signs and when to call 911. Fall prevention education provided.

text.div: Dementia Care Plan - Active plan for patient ptp04. Diagnosis: Alzheimer's disease, moderate stage. Treatment: Donepezil, memantine, structured daily routine, caregiver support, safety measures, advance directive discussions.

title: Alzheimer's Disease Management and Care Plan
description: Comprehensive dementia management plan for patient with moderate Alzheimer's disease. Pharmacotherapy, behavioral interventions, caregiver support, safety planning, and advance care planning.

addresses.display: Behavioral and psychological symptoms of dementia

goal.display: Maintain current MMSE with medications for 12 months
Reduce behavioral symptoms - agitation, wandering

detail.description: Donepezil 10mg nightly
Memantine 10mg BID
Monthly caregiver support group and education sessions

note.text: GPS tracking device discussed with family for wandering safety. Driving assessment recommended - patient advised not to drive pending evaluation. Legal documents (DPOA, advance directive) reviewed.

text.div: Annual Preventive Care Plan - Active plan for patient ptp05. Age 70 male. Preventive services: colorectal cancer screening, prostate cancer discussion, DEXA scan, influenza/pneumococcal vaccines, fall risk assessment, cognitive screening.

title: Annual Preventive Care and Wellness Plan - Age 70
description: Comprehensive preventive care plan for 70-year-old male patient Thomas Begay per USPSTF and ACIP guidelines. Age-appropriate screenings, immunizations, fall prevention, and health promotion activities.

goal.display: Complete all age-appropriate preventive screenings
Up to date on all recommended immunizations

detail.description: Colonoscopy screening - last performed 2016, due for repeat
DEXA scan for osteoporosis screening
Influenza and Pneumococcal (PPSV23, PCV20) vaccines administered

note.text: Fall risk assessment completed - Timed Up and Go test 14 seconds (moderate risk). Referred to physical therapy for fall prevention exercise program. Cognitive screening MoCA 25/30 - within normal limits for age.

text.div: General Wellness and Health Maintenance Plan - Active plan for patient Ptp08. Annual physicals, healthy lifestyle coaching, stress management, and preventive screenings for young adult female.

title: General Wellness and Health Maintenance Plan
description: Annual health maintenance and wellness plan for 24-year-old female patient Li Chen. Preventive screenings per USPSTF guidelines, lifestyle coaching, contraception counseling, and mental health check-ins.

addresses.display: Encounter for general adult medical examination

goal.display: Maintain BMI 18.5-24.9
Complete all age-appropriate screenings

coding.display: Screening for malignant neoplasm of cervix

detail.description: Cervical cancer screening - Pap smear and HPV co-test
Annual depression screening PHQ-9
Annual lifestyle counseling - diet, exercise, sleep, stress management

note.text: Lab work reviewed - all values within normal limits. HPV vaccine series confirmed complete. Contraception method reviewed - satisfied with current method. No concerns today.

text.div: Post-Discharge Follow-up Plan - Active transition care plan for patient ptp07. Discharged after hospitalization for COPD exacerbation. 30-day follow-up plan with PCP, pulmonology, medication reconciliation, and home health services.

title: Post-Hospitalization Transition Care Plan - COPD Exacerbation
description: 30-day transitional care plan for Marcus Washington following hospitalization for acute COPD exacerbation. Includes early post-discharge follow-up, medication reconciliation, home health, and care coordination.

goal.display: Attend PCP follow-up within 7 days of discharge
No hospital readmission within 30 days

detail.description: PCP follow-up within 7 days post-discharge
Pulmonology follow-up within 14 days post-discharge
Home health nursing visits 3x per week - respiratory assessment, medication compliance

note.text: Patient discharged on prednisone taper and azithromycin. Medication reconciliation completed. Patient education on inhaler technique and action plan for worsening symptoms. Transition coach assigned.

text.div: Palliative Care Plan - Active plan for patient ptp08. Advanced pancreatic cancer. Goals of care: comfort-focused, symptom management, psychosocial support, hospice eligibility evaluation, advance directive in place.

title: Palliative and Comfort Care Plan - Advanced Pancreatic Cancer
description: Palliative care plan for patient with advanced pancreatic cancer who has chosen comfort-focused goals of care. Prioritizes symptom management, quality of life, psychosocial support, and advance care planning.

goal.display: Pain NRS maintained at 3 or below
Remain at home per patient preference
Complete advance directive and POLST

detail.description: Morphine 15mg oral q4h PRN for pain - comfort measures
Weekly palliative care team visit - symptom assessment, psychosocial support
Hospice eligibility evaluation and enrollment if 6-month prognosis met

note.text: Family meeting held - prognosis discussed openly. POLST completed - DNR, comfort measures only. Patient's primary goal is to remain home with family. Spiritual care requested. Grief support offered to family.

text.div: Pediatric Developmental Care Plan - Active plan for pediatric patient. Diagnosis: Autism Spectrum Disorder, Level 2. Treatment: ABA therapy 25h/week, speech therapy, OT, structured educational plan (IEP), parent training.

title: Autism Spectrum Disorder Comprehensive Treatment Plan
description: Comprehensive developmental and behavioral treatment plan for child with ASD Level 2. Intensive ABA therapy, speech-language therapy, occupational therapy, educational planning, and family support.

goal.display: Increase functional communication to 50+ spontaneous words in 6 months
Reduce self-injurious behaviors by 80% in 12 months

detail.description: ABA therapy 25 hours per week (5 hours/day, 5 days/week)
Speech-language therapy 3x per week - 45 min sessions - functional communication
Occupational therapy 2x per week - sensory processing, fine motor, self-care ADLs

note.text: IEP meeting scheduled with school district. Insurance authorization for ABA approved - 25 hrs/week. Parent training in ABA techniques initiated. Genetic testing (chromosomal microarray, Fragile X) ordered.

text.div: Community Health and Social Determinants Plan - Active plan for patient ptp10. Addresses SDOH barriers including food insecurity, housing instability, transportation, and social isolation. Connects patient to community resources.

category.text: Community Health and SDOH Action Plan

title: Community Health and Social Determinants of Health Action Plan
description: Comprehensive social determinants of health (SDOH) intervention plan for patient Sophia Nakamura. Addresses food insecurity, transportation barriers, financial assistance, and community resource connections.

supportingInfo.display: PRAPARE SDOH screening - multiple positive domains
Hunger Vital Sign - positive for food insecurity

goal.display: Enroll in SNAP benefits within 30 days
Obtain stable housing within 90 days
Connect to 3 community social support resources within 60 days

detail.description: Bi-weekly social work case management - housing assistance, benefit enrollment
Referral to local food bank and SNAP enrollment assistance
Enroll in non-emergency medical transportation (NEMT) program for medical appointments

note.text: AHC Health-Related Social Needs screening completed. Patient connected with housing authority waitlist. Local food pantry referral provided. Patient interested in job training program - referral to workforce development center made.
